command:
TOKEN=$(/home/keith/.agents/skills/github-bot/scripts/github-token.sh) || exit 90
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, subprocess, sys, urllib.request
repo='xbmc/kodiai'
token=os.environ.get('TOKEN')
req=urllib.request.Request(f'https://api.github.com/repos/{repo}/pulls?state=open&per_page=20', headers={'Authorization': f'token {token}', 'Accept':'application/vnd.github+json','X-GitHub-Api-Version':'2022-11-28','User-Agent':'kodiai-m066-smoke'})
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as r:
        data=json.load(r)
except Exception as e:
    print(json.dumps({'ok':False,'repo':repo,'error':type(e).__name__,'message':str(e)[:180]}))
    sys.exit(1)
print(json.dumps({'ok':True,'repo':repo,'open_prs':[{'number':p.get('number'),'title':p.get('title'),'url':p.get('html_url'),'head':p.get('head',{}).get('ref'),'base':p.get('base',{}).get('ref'),'author':p.get('user',{}).get('login'),'draft':p.get('draft')} for p in data[:10]]}, indent=2))
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request, urllib.error, sys
repo='xbmc/kodiai'
req=urllib.request.Request(f'https://api.github.com/repos/{repo}/pulls?state=open&per_page=10', headers={'Accept':'application/vnd.github+json','X-GitHub-Api-Version':'2022-11-28','User-Agent':'kodiai-m066-smoke'})
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as r:
        data=json.load(r)
    print(json.dumps({'ok':True,'repo':repo,'open_pr_count_returned':len(data),'open_prs':[{'number':p.get('number'),'title':p.get('title'),'url':p.get('html_url'),'head':p.get('head',{}).get('ref'),'base':p.get('base',{}).get('ref'),'author':p.get('user',{}).get('login'),'draft':p.get('draft')} for p in data[:10]]}, indent=2))
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    body=e.read(300).decode('utf-8','replace')
    print(json.dumps({'ok':False,'repo':repo,'status':e.code,'message':body}))
    sys.exit(1)
except Exception as e:
    print(json.dumps({'ok':False,'repo':repo,'error':type(e).__name__,'message':str(e)[:180]}))
    sys.exit(1)
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, shutil, subprocess, time
checks=[]
start=time.time();
keys=['M066_S05_REPO','M066_S05_REVIEW_OUTPUT_KEY','M066_S05_DELIVERY_ID','GITHUB_APP_ID','GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY','GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64','GITHUB_TOKEN','GH_TOKEN']
checks.append({'check':'environment credential presence','ok': all(bool(os.environ.get(k)) for k in ['GITHUB_APP_ID']) and (bool(os.environ.get('GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY')) or bool(os.environ.get('GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64'))), 'details': {k: bool(os.environ.get(k)) for k in keys}})
# Verify token helper exists but whether it can mint token, without printing token.
helper='/home/keith/.agents/skills/github-bot/scripts/github-token.sh'
if os.path.exists(helper):
    proc=subprocess.run([helper], stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.PIPE, text=True, timeout=20)
    checks.append({'check':'github-bot token helper','ok': proc.returncode==0, 'exit': proc.returncode, 'stderr_excerpt': proc.stderr[-200:]})
else:
    checks.append({'check':'github-bot token helper','ok': False, 'exit': None, 'stderr_excerpt': 'helper missing'})
print(json.dumps({'generated_at': time.strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', time.gmtime()), 'checks': checks}, indent=2))
PY
